column1: # Applied by sap_gm_normalize.ps1 to spool / table captures BEFORE diffing, so a
# re-run's volatile tokens (dates, times, timestamps) do not read as regressions.
# Two token classes are handled structurally in the script, NOT here: CAPTURE_USER
# (the executing user, passed at runtime -> <USER>) and PAGE_FEED (form-feed page
# breaks in unconverted spool). Customer override:
# enabled: 1 = on, 0 = opt-in (enable per baseline via --rules or the manifest)
# The regex is .NET regex; replacement is the literal token. Order matters
# (longer/timestamp patterns first so a 14-digit stamp is not eaten by a date rule).
# Cell separator is TAB. Lines starting with # and blank lines are skipped.
